Based on the provided text, the commentator and author who questioned the validity of the Center for Organizational Research and Education (CORE)'s non-profit status is **Rachel Maddow**.

The text states that while experts on non-profit law questioned the group's status in publications like "The Chronicle of Philanthropy," commentators including Rachel Maddow (who is identified in the first paragraph as a "television host, political commentator, and author") have treated the group as an entity specializing in astroturfing, implying skepticism regarding its legitimate non-profit standing.
